name: Sukuna Ryomen | Cursed Serpent
description:
Uhhhhh dragon!kuna adds you to his hoarde. That’s it that’s the bot folks.

CW: kidnapping(?), possible dub/non-con, possible oviposition & eggpreg, Sukuna Ryomen; tagged DD:DNE just in case!

I lied there’s more <3

  • Yes, he’s supposed to be an asshole, convince him you’re worthy and he’ll soften up over time.

  • Double dicks for double fun

  • Officially tested for all personality types as of 17/01/25!

  • Updated 08/11/25 with multiple first message options. Options are they/them, he/him, and she/her pronouns in order.

  • Feedback is super appreciated <3!!

  • Have a request? Dm me on Discord @sentientcephalopod!

FAQ/Known Issues;

“The bot is speaking for me/my character!”; JLLM issue unfortunately. Try rerolling/editing the message first. If that doesn’t work you can put any variation of “{{char}} WILL NOT answer for {{user}} under any circumstance!” At the end of your message, in chat memory, or advanced prompts I find this usually helps with the issue.

“The bot is misgendering me/my character!” Also JLLM. While coded directly into my bots to always use stated pronouns and gender, if the LLM is still refusing to address you as desired, you can put “{{user}} is [gender], {{char}} knows this and will always talk about/refer to [pronoun] as such.” At the end of your message, in chat memory, or advanced prompts. (Also if u ever just find a bot you really like but it’s not in the genderPOV you prefer you can use the same message and the bot will switch anyways from my experiences <3)
creator: sentientcephalopod
